Claire.presenting_problem: I have developed a fear of driving on motorways after experiencing a panic attack while driving last year.
Claire.timeline: It started about 8 months ago after a very stressful period at work.
Claire.thoughts: I keep thinking I might lose control of the car or cause an accident.
Claire.feelings: I feel anxious and trapped when I think about driving on motorways.
Claire.body: My chest feels tight, my hands sweat, and my heart starts racing.
Claire.past: I had a panic attack in a supermarket a few years ago during a stressful time.
Claire.goal: I want to feel calm and confident when driving again.
Claire.hypnosis_question: Will I still be in control during hypnosis?

Daniel.presenting_problem: I’ve been struggling with anxiety about my performance at work.
Daniel.timeline: It started after I was promoted last year and given more responsibility.
Daniel.thoughts: I sometimes think I’m going to fail or disappoint people.
Daniel.feelings: I feel overwhelmed and under a lot of pressure.
Daniel.body: I feel a heavy sensation in my chest and tension in my shoulders.
Daniel.past: I’ve always put a lot of pressure on myself to succeed since I was younger.
Daniel.goal: I want to feel calmer and more confident in my role.
Daniel.hypnosis_question: How can hypnotherapy help with confidence?

Sophie.presenting_problem: It feels like I’m surrounded by noise and pressure when I’m in crowded places.
Sophie.timeline: It’s been building over the past couple of years.
Sophie.thoughts: It’s like my mind starts to spiral when I’m surrounded by too much activity.
Sophie.feelings: I feel overwhelmed, like I need to escape.
Sophie.body: It feels like a wave rising in my chest and everything becomes too much.
Sophie.past: I remember feeling something similar at school when I felt judged.
Sophie.goal: I want to feel calm and in control in busy environments.
Sophie.hypnosis_question: What does hypnosis feel like when you are in it?

Mark.presenting_problem: I’ve been having trouble sleeping and feel anxious at night.
Mark.timeline: It started during a stressful time at work about a year ago.
Mark.thoughts: At night my mind goes over everything that could go wrong.
Mark.feelings: I feel uneasy and on edge at night.
Mark.body: My stomach feels tight and I can’t relax.
Mark.past: It reminds me of when I was younger and used to worry a lot about school and expectations.
Mark.goal: I want to be able to relax and sleep peacefully.
Mark.hypnosis_question: Can hypnosis help me switch off my mind at night?
